sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check all nodes including purple bar
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== ALL NODES ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    boundary = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    print(f"id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}], cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}], children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
